controlNotes: Instructions use standard analog mixer terminology. Locate the EQ section on the channel strip. Most analog mixers have 3–4 EQ bands with knobs for gain. Sweepable bands also have a frequency knob. Turn clockwise to boost, counter-clockwise to cut.

instructionTemplates.openEQ: Find the EQ knobs on CH {channel}
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: Enable the HIGH PASS (LOW CUT) filter switch on CH {channel}
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Turn the {band} frequency sweep knob to approximately {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.setBandGain: Turn the {band} gain knob {direction} to adjust by approximately {amount}dB
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: No save required — analog settings are held by the physical knob positions
